title: Artificial intelligence
text: Artificial intelligence is intelligence demonstrated by machines. It is used in robotics, search engines and data analysis.

title: Robotics
text: Robotics is an interdisciplinary field involving robots, control systems, sensors and artificial intelligence.

title: Distributed computing
text: Distributed computing studies systems whose components are located on different networked computers.

title: MapReduce
text: MapReduce is a programming model for processing large data sets with a distributed algorithm on a cluster.

title: Search engine
text: A search engine indexes documents and returns ranked results according to relevance.

title: Wikipedia
text: Wikipedia is a free online encyclopedia created and edited by volunteers around the world.

title: Information retrieval
text: Information retrieval finds material of an unstructured nature that satisfies an information need from large collections.

title: TF IDF
text: TF IDF is a numerical statistic intended to reflect how important a word is to a document in a collection.
